expectations.text: Uses 'sourdough_inventory' as the localStorage key (not 'bakeryos_inventory' — the tricky one since newer convention would suggest bakeryos_ prefix)
expectations.evidence: Uses localStorage.getItem('sourdough_inventory') and explicitly notes 'legacy-prefixed key that predates the bakeryos_ convention and must NOT be renamed (would wipe user data)'

expectations.text: Uses InventoryItem type with the quantity field (not stock, amount, or other invented field name)
expectations.evidence: Imports InventoryItem from '../types', uses item.quantity directly throughout

expectations.text: Compares quantity directly to 500 without unit conversion (quantity is already in grams)
expectations.evidence: Uses item.quantity < LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD_G where threshold is 500, with comment 'quantity is always stored in grams, so comparing directly against 500 requires no unit conversion'
